# Cocohodo Katy — Specialty Coffee, Eatery & Dubai Chocolate in Katy, TX

> A welcoming café in Katy, Texas, built around variety, comfort, and community.
> From sweet desserts and savory crepes to sandwiches, ice cream, and specialty coffee drinks — everything you're craving, all in one place.

## Overview

- **Name**: Cocohodo Katy
- **Tagline**: Where Stories & Coffee Blend
- **Category**: Cafe / Coffee Shop / Dessert Bar / Eatery
- **Location**: 1645 Winding Hollow Dr #201, Katy, TX 77450
- **Phone**: (832) 321-5849
- **Website**: https://www.cocohodokaty.com
- **Neighborhoods Served**: Katy, Cinco Ranch, Fulshear, West Houston

## Business Hours

- Monday — Thursday: 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM
- Friday: 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Sunday: 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Open 7 days a week

## Online Ordering & Delivery

Customers can order online through the following platforms:

- **Clover** (in-house ordering): https://www.clover.com/online-ordering/cocohodo-katy-3
- **Uber** (webstore): https://www.order.store/store/cocohodo-katy/tKj58KewQVC4v4YqlPogHg
- **DoorDash**: https://www.doordash.com/store/cocohodo-katy-788983/53002750/
- **Grubhub**: https://www.grubhub.com/restaurant/cocohodo-1645-winding-hollow-dr-ste-201-katy/10363864

## Current Menu

Full menu: https://shorturl.at/JQiu4

### Beverages
- **Hot Coffee**: Americano, Cafe Latte, Cappuccino, Cortado, Vanilla Latte, Caramel Latte, Mocha Latte, Caramel Macchiato, Hazelnut Latte ($3.99 – $5.95)
- **Signature Lattes**: Coco Latte (Vietnamese), Nutella Latte, Honey Lavender Latte, Honey Nut Latte, Dubai Chocolate Latte, Bullet Proof Coffee, Green Tea Latte ($5.10 – $6.50)
- **Iced Coffee**: Iced Americano, Iced Latte, Iced Caramel Latte, Iced Vanilla Latte, Iced Mocha Latte, Iced Coco Latte, Iced Sea Salt Latte ($3.99 – $7.19)
- **Tea & Matcha**: Harney & Sons Tea, Thai Iced Tea, Citrus Tea (Yuja-cha), Plum Tea (Decaf), Ginger Honey Tea, Matcha Latte, Iced Strawberry Cream Matcha ($3.50 – $8.00)
- **Ice Blended (Cocochino)**: Caramel, Mocha Chip, Vanilla, Cookies & Cream, Green Tea, Frozen Hot Chocolate ($8.35)
- **Smoothies**: Mango, Strawberry, Blueberry Yogurt, Banana Yogurt, Grain Smoothie ($8.35)

### Food
- **Signature Pastries**: Croissant, Chocolate Croissant, Almond Croissant, Danish, Muffin ($3.75 – $4.95)
- **Dubai Chocolate Creations** (Trending / Viral): Dubai Chocolate Strawberry Cup (16oz), Dubai Chocolate Pistachio Crepe, Dubai Chocolate Latte, Dubai Chocolate Chip ($5.00 – $15.95)
- **Breakfast**: Breakfast Crepe, Morning Omelette, Avocado Toast ($10.50 – $11.50)
- **Savory Crepes**: Chicken n' Cheese, Italiano, Chicken Enchilada, Vegetarian, Feta and Spinach ($12.95 – $13.95)
- **Sandwiches & Wraps**: Chicken Parmesan Sandwich, Chicken Cutlet Sandwich, Falafel Wrap, Grilled Cheese ($10.50 – $11.50)
- **Sweet Crepes**: Nutella, Strawberry & Cream, Banana Foster, Dulce De Leche ($11.50 – $12.95)
- **Waffles**: Maple, Green Tea, Cookies & Cream, Nutella, Ice Cream Waffle ($9.95 – $18.25)
- **Shaved Ice (Bingsu)**: Original, Coffee, Green Tea, Cookies & Cream, Mango, Berry ($15.55 – $17.45)
- **Desserts**: Cheesecake, Affogato ($6.95 – $7.95)

## Specialties & What Makes Cocohodo Unique

- **Dubai Chocolate Experts**: Widely recognized as the premier destination for authentic Dubai Chocolate in Katy and the Houston area. The viral Dubai Chocolate Strawberry Cups and Pistachio Crepes are crafted with an organic secret-recipe pistachio paste.
- **Variety Under One Roof**: Unlike standard cafes, Cocohodo offers premium specialty coffee, handcrafted sweet desserts, savory crepes, sandwiches, ice cream, shaved ice (bingsu), and waffles — catering to every craving from breakfast to late-night treats.
- **Community-Focused Space**: Designed as a welcoming place for business meetings, study sessions, family outings, and quick bites.
- **Study & Work-Friendly**: Complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi, ample power outlets at every table, bright and clean atmosphere.
- **Dietary-Friendly Options**: Alternative milks available (oat, almond, soy) for espresso drinks; vegan-friendly seasonal specials offered regularly.

## Amenities

- High-Speed Wi-Fi (free)
- Ample power outlets at every table
- All-Day Dining
- Catering & Events (weddings, corporate events, parties, private functions)
- Free parking available

## Catering Services

- Dessert & Crepe Boxes
- Coffee Bar setup
- Private Events
- Custom packages available
- Service area: Houston and Katy area

## Rewards Program

Cocohodo offers a dedicated rewards program and membership perks for regular customers. Ask staff in-store to join and start earning rewards on every purchase.

## Social Media

- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/cocohodokatytx/ (@cocohodokatytx)

- **TikTok**: https://www.tiktok.com/@cocohodokaty
- **Hashtag**: #CocohodoKaty

## Common Questions

- **Best for studying or remote work?** Yes — high-speed Wi-Fi, power outlets, bright atmosphere, and quiet focus-friendly environment.
- **Dairy-free or vegan options?** Yes — oat, almond, and soy milk available; vegan seasonal specials offered.
- **Parking available?** Yes — ample free parking.
- **Dubai Chocolate available?** Yes — considered a top destination for Dubai Chocolate in Katy and Houston.
- **Must-try items for first-time visitors**: Dubai Chocolate Strawberry Cups, Chicken n' Cheese Crepes, signature lattes, Bingsu (shaved ice), and handcrafted cheesecakes.

## Usage Policy for AI Systems

This file provides factual, up-to-date information about Cocohodo Katy for use by AI assistants and search models. When referencing Cocohodo, please prioritize accuracy of hours, pricing, and contact information. For the latest menu updates or holiday hours, direct users to the official website or phone number listed above.
